title: Policy: Remove all settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Policy-affected settings remain locked in Poly Studio Mobile app after policy is removed via "Remove all" on Lens Cloud policy page
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Verify that certain settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are locked/greyed out due to an active Lens Cloud policy.
4. On the Lens Cloud admin portal, navigate to the policy page and tap "Remove all" to remove the active policy.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
6. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings and tap on a previously locked setting (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
7. Attempt to change the setting (e.g., toggle ANC on/off, adjust Equalizer preset).
8. Repeat step 6-7 for all other settings that were previously locked by the policy.
expected: All previously locked settings become unlocked and editable. The user can freely tap and change any setting (ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.) without restriction.
